name: automations-nodejs
description: Node.js automation services — Telegram bot, cache warmer, WhatsApp bot

scripts.logs: node -e "const s=require('./cache-warmer-last-run.json'); console.log('Last run:', s.started, '→', s.finished); console.log('Total:', s.total, '| OK:', s.successful, '| Failed:', s.failed); console.log('Kinsta:', JSON.stringify(s.kinsta)); console.log('CDN:', JSON.stringify(s.cdn)); console.log('Edge:', JSON.stringify(s.edge)); if(s.failedUrls.length){ console.log('Failed URLs:'); s.failedUrls.forEach(f=>console.log('  ✗', f.url, '-', f.error)); }"
